Packaging: Ensure targz build parity between Make and dagger
Fix: Set correct border-radius on Alert background
Dashboard: Use preferredVersion from discovery endpoint for API version negotiation
[release-12.4.3] UsageAnalytics: Add data source id back to emitted analytics event
CI: Set '$PWD' as first arg in build.sh
IAM: Extract subresource authorizer for reuse
datasources: querier: optional raw output mode
Chore: Add lint rule for consistent type imports
patch(security): fix(ofrep): limit input body to 1 MiB
feature flags: use UTC timestamps in csv
Alerting: Replace provisioning banner with inline badge in rule detail view
FS: Remove per-tenant CSP override
Fix mutation test to use v2 stable TransformationKind shape
Teams: Fix team modal not closing when deleting a team
Rendering: Prohibit usage of empty/default render auth token in JWT mode
InfluxDB: Remove context menu "remove" option from query builder
Rich history drawer: Translation added
Cloudwatch: Update error code metrics for ES/OpenSearch
Admin: Enable debug logging for flaky test
Dashboard: Switch frontend API to v2 and align TransformationKind
PanelChrome: exclude table column headers from triggering panel selection in edit mode
Grafana Advisor: General Availability
Elasticsearch: Remove core datasource
Dashboard variables: Clean up outdated documentation code
Analytics: Keep internal dashboard id
UsageAnalytics: Add data source id back to emitted analytics event
Datasources: Disable deprecated numeric id using APIs by default
Filters: Non applicability tooltip improvements and on query change update
